title: myagrum clavatum
intro: Myagrum clavatum, also known as Sea Holly, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. Its medicinal properties include being used to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and dermatitis, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is also known for its ability to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the digestive system. Sea Holly can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a range of herbal preparations.
